name: Qwen3.6-27B
archDisplay: Hybrid-attention dense model (Qwen3-Next lineage, no MoE routing): 64 layers, 16x(3x(Gated DeltaNet -> FFN) -> 1x(Gated Attention -> FFN)); hidden dim 5120, FFN intermediate dim 17408; natively multimodal (Causal LM with built-in vision encoder)
note: Not in the original flagged leads, but discovered via direct primary-source research (qwen.ai/blog and github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3.6) while verifying the flagged models -- and arguably the single most important model actually missing, since it is explicitly billed by Alibaba as surpassing the prior open-weight flagship Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (15x its parameter count) on every major agentic-coding benchmark despite being fully dense at 27B params.

specSources.releaseDate (official changelog + blog,: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3.6 (README: '2026-04-22: Qwen3.6-27B is now available'); https://qwen.ai/blog?id=qwen3.6-27b

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified; beats Qwen3.5-397B-A17B's 76.2 despite ~15x fewer total params. Independently corroborated at the same value (77.2%) by localaimaster.com's third-party review.
SWE-bench Pro, from the official HF model card's benchmark table.

Listed as 'AIME26' (AIME 2026) on the official HF model card.

OCRBench, official HF model card's 'Text Recognition and Document Understanding' vision-language table (alongside CharXiv RQ 78.4 and CC-OCR 81.2, which are already tracked or unmappable). Not previously in the corpus entry despite the rest of the same table being tracked.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of its own HF model card (huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B), its own launch blog (qwen.ai/blog?id=qwen3.6-27b, 'Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model'), and the official QwenLM/Qwen3.6 GitHub README changelog -- all three independently agree on the 2026-04-22 release date. Not part of the original flagged leads (which covered a generic 'Qwen3.6, ~35B' entry only); found while directly browsing qwen.ai/blog and github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3.6 per task instructions, and included because it is a real, distinct, currently-shipping model that is arguably the single biggest gap in the corpus's Qwen coverage -- Alibaba's own framing is that it 'outperforms the 397B-parameter Qwen3.5-397B-A17B on every major agentic coding benchmark' at 1/15th the total parameter count. SWE-bench Verified score (77.2) independently corroborated by a third-party review site (localaimaster.com, 'Qwen3.6-27B Review: Dense 27B Beats 397B MoE'), which reports the identical figure -- this is a genuine independent (non-Alibaba) confirmation, unlike most other results in this batch. archClass is 'hybrid' (not 'dense') despite having no MoE routing, because the defining architectural feature is the Gated DeltaNet/Gated-Attention hybrid-attention interleaving, consistent with how the other Qwen3.5/3.6-generation models in this batch are classified.
